author: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice
book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

classification.cautionReason: Conciliar or creedal material received in mainstream Nicene Christian tradition, with denominational differences on some canons.

lineage: The Canons of the Synods of Sardica, Carthage, Constantinople, and Carthage Under St. Cyprian, Which Canons Were Received by the Council in Trullo and Ratified by II. Nice.
The Canons of the CCXVII Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage. Commonly Called The Code of Canons of the African Church.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.

title: Canon C.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Of the suggestion of Bishop Maurentius.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: Bishop Maurentius having an information against him, lying before the council, moves for a hearing; but the informers don’t appear upon three calls made by the deacons on the day appointed.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: The cause is referred to Senex Xantippus, Augustinus, and five more summoned by the council, the informers were to make up the number twelve.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: It is right that sentence be given on the subdeacons who are said to be present from Nova Germania, who have thrice been sought and not found.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: But out of regard to ecclesiastical gentleness, let some be sent to look into the matter.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: The contents of this canon are of a private character, and therefore have not been commented on.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: This canon is Canon vj. of Carthage, a.d.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: “Senex” i.e. Primate Xantippus, as is commonly believed.

verses.book: The Canons of the 217 Blessed Fathers who assembled at Carthage.
verses.text: He and others have this title frequently given them in the acts of these councils.
